name: Choron Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh tomatoes, peeled and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heatproof bowl, whisk the egg yolks with 1 tablespoon of the lemon juice until thick and pale.
2. Set the bowl over a pan of barely simmering water, stirring constantly, until warm but not hot.
3. Stir in butter, a few tablespoons at a time, until all butter is incorporated.
4. Cook, stirring, until the sauce thickens enough to lightly coat the back of a spoon.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining lemon juice, Tabasco, salt, pepper, and cayenne to taste.
6. Gently fold in the tomatoes. Yield: About 2 cups
